title: Chat Hider
description: ChatHider is a Minecraft mod that hides the in-game chat when the player isn’t actively focused on it, toggled with /chathider to enable or disable this functionality.
body: ChatHider is a lightweight Minecraft mod designed to improve the player’s chat experience by automatically hiding the in-game chat when the player is not actively focused on it. The mod is fully command-based, allowing players to toggle the chat visibility on or off using the /chathider command. This ensures a cleaner screen during gameplay while still providing quick access to chat when needed. ChatHider supports all versions 1.21 and above and is optimized for minimal performance impact, making it a simple yet effective tool for players who prefer an uncluttered interface.
